deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

variables.title: Template variables (replaced with the viewing user's own data)
variables.subscribeUrlEncoded: Subscription link, URL-encoded (most client deep links)
variables.ifSubscribed: Conditional block: shows the wrapped content only to users with an active subscription (use {{#if_not_subscribed}}…{{/if_not_subscribed}} for the opposite).
